title: Ozone
description: A clean and minimalist GUI pack
body:
![Static Badge](https://img.shields.io/badge/Resourcepack-Type?label=Type&labelColor=282c2c&color=F0B132) ![Static Badge](https://img.shields.io/badge/Client-Loader?label=Loader&labelColor=282c2c&color=00A8FC) --- ### 📋 About This resourcepack provides a redesign of everything that is not specifically part of the "Minecraft" game concept. This includes, for example, the settings, advancements, menus and the world border. But not containers of workbench or oven, etc. --- ### ⚙️ Compatibility This pack can be used with other resourcepacks without any issues. Some resource packs may change the same things as Ozone, it is therefore advisable to **place Ozone at the top of the resource packs**. In addition, **OptiFine should ideally be used**, as some things require its functionality. #### ✔️ Personal Recommendation The Lunar Client and its mods, such as the Menu Blur mod, fit perfectly with the design of Ozone. Also, some things get even more better when having an shader like BSL activated. ---
📦 Features
  • Menus
    • Buttons, Sliders
    • Recipe book
    • Advanvement menu
    • Resourcepack/Datapack menu (WiP), World/Server selection, World creation menu (WiP)
  • Environment
    • World border
    • Rain, Snow
  • Hotbar
  • Gamemode switcher
  • Tooltips (Core shader)
  • Resource loading screen (OF)
  • Click sound
⚠️ Known issues
  • Tooltips become invisible when having Lunar Clients Scrollable Tooltips mod enabled
📝 Credits
  • Sodium for Inspiration
  • Royal Tooltips by DartCat25
